json_data.title: Agile Software Development Methodologies
json_data.reason: Understanding agile frameworks provides broader context for the 'agile-friendly' SRE processes covered in the project.

json_data.title: Requirements Engineering for AI-Powered Systems
json_data.reason: This explores the unique challenges of eliciting and managing requirements for complex AI systems, building on modern software trends.

json_data.title: Automated Requirements Analysis and Conflict Detection using Natural Language Processing (NLP)
json_data.reason: This research topic investigates advanced AI techniques to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of requirements analysis and validation.
